creator: mackey@musc.edu
text:
ISO installation of 6.1 Release will not format the file system and
commence the installation of the files.

This is a 6.0 Installation message log - vanilla, if you need hdwe list.
The only scsi with drives is the PowerEdge RAID, which formats correctly
under 6.0 installation.  I replaced the raid card with another identical
card and the results were the same.

How-To-Repeat: Any installation from ISO CD (expert, std, etc.) will replicate the problem
